brand_dna.category: Handcrafted gourmet dip, soup, BBQ rub and seasoning mixes sold direct-to-consumer and wholesale.
brand_dna.core_belief: Founder Ellie Hughes believes gourmet taste belongs at home: 'I am the person that eats at a fine restaurant and creates the same taste in my kitchen.'
proof_points: Handcrafted in small batches using the freshest ingredients
Gluten Free, Low Sodium, No MSG, No Preservatives
Founder-led since 2005 with 20 dip mixes, 22 soup mixes, 13 BBQ rubs and more
brand_dna.positioning: Approachable gourmet - fine-restaurant flavor made fast and easy for busy home cooks, not mass-market bland.

voice_pillars.name: Playfully Bold
voice_pillars.desc: Fun, punchy, spice-forward language that invites people to have a little fun with flavor.
voice_pillars.quote: It's BBQ Time so let's get a little twisted

voice_pillars.name: Encourages Creativity
voice_pillars.desc: Frames every product as a starting point the cook can riff on and make their own.
voice_pillars.quote: Get Creative and make it your own recipe

voice_pillars.name: Fast and Easy
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to busy people who want quick, delicious results without fuss.
voice_pillars.quote: helping busy people learn how to create quick and easy delicious meals

voice_pillars.name: Handcrafted Pride
voice_pillars.desc: Leans on small-batch, maker credibility and fresh ingredients.
voice_pillars.quote: Handcrafted in small batches and using the freshest ingredients

phrases: Get Creative and make it your own recipe
Soup's On in 30 minutes or less!

icp: Busy home cooks and gift-givers who love bold, gourmet flavor but want fast, easy, gluten-free and low-sodium ways to make everyday meals and appetizers feel special.

personas.name: The Flavor Chaser
personas.description: Craves intense, spicy, jalapeno-forward taste and responds to bold flavor promises and creative recipe ideas.

personas.name: The Busy Host
personas.description: Needs quick appetizers and 30-minute meals for get-togethers and is moved by easy prep plus crowd-pleasing results.

personas.name: The Gift Shopper
personas.description: Buys gift boxes and bags for the soup or BBQ lover in their life and responds to giftable bundles and 'huge hit' social proof.

allowed.claim: Gluten Free, Low Sodium, No MSG, No Preservatives
Handcrafted in small batches using the freshest ingredients
allowed.source: High Steaks BBQ rubs product page

allowed.claim: Made in the USA using the finest ingredients
Free shipping when you spend $40, no code needed, plus free gift
Soup's On in 30 minutes or less

banned.claim: Low sodium helps lower blood pressure or improves heart health
banned.why: Health/structure-function claim - would make the food a drug; not supported by any study on site.

banned.claim: Gluten Free treats or relieves celiac disease or digestive conditions
banned.why: Disease treatment claim not permitted; gluten free is an ingredient fact, not a cure.

banned.claim: No MSG makes it healthier or prevents headaches
banned.why: Unsubstantiated health claim; state 'No MSG' as a fact only, not a benefit.

banned.claim: Clinically proven to be the healthiest seasoning
banned.why: 'Clinically proven' requires a real study; none provided in the input.

banned.claim: Detoxes or boosts metabolism / aids weight loss
banned.why: Structure-function health claim with no evidence; off-brand and non-compliant.

banned.claim: All-natural or preservative-free across the entire catalog
banned.why: Only specific products state 'No Preservatives'; unqualified blanket claim is unsupported.
